design_philosophy.core_concept: Bold & Vibrant Technical Precision. Combining the cold logic of full-stack engineering with high-energy neon/steel-blue accents to convey innovation and power.
design_philosophy.contrast_strategy: Deep obsidian/slate backgrounds cut by intense steel blue highlights and stark white typography.

scales.overline: text-xs md:text-sm font-bold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-blue-500

cards.classes: bg-slate-900/40 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 hover:border-blue-500/30 transition-all duration-300 rounded-2xl p-8

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-lg transition-colors shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(59,130,246,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(59,130,246,0.5)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 hover:border-white text-white font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-lg transition-all

navigation.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-slate-950/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5

hero.layout: Grid-based asymmetrical split or prominent centered block with large typography
hero.visuals: Use the 'hero_bg' image as an absolute positioned background with bg-slate-950/80 overlay to ensure text contrast. Big glowing H1.

services.layout: Bento Grid (Mode A). Different sized cards (span 4, span 8) for Full Stack, Frontend, Middle, DBs.

tech_stack.layout: Infinite Marquee (React Fast Marquee) + categorized grid (Frontend: React; Middle: Python, Java, .NET; DB: MySQL, SQL Server, Oracle, MongoDB).
tech_stack.visuals: Use React Icons (devicons) for the tech stacks.

projects.logic: Must load from a hardcoded JSON file. Define a constant in the component or separate data file.
projects.layout: Grid cols-1 md:cols-2. Large image cover, sleek text below. Using 'software_dashboard' images.

process.layout: Vertical timeline or staggered horizontal steps.
process.visuals: Use 'process_bg' image sparingly or as a section background with heavy overlay.

testimonials.layout: Offset grid or sleek Shadcn Carousel.

team.layout: Grid cols-1 md:cols-3 or 4. Generous spacing.

pricing.layout: 3-column grid. Middle column scale-105 with active 'Tracing Beam' border effect (blue shadow/border).

faq.visuals: Minimalist, no boxes around accordions, just bottom borders.

contact.layout: Two column: Left text/info, Right form.
contact.logic: Mock email submission with Shadcn Form/Sonner Toast.

footer.layout: Massive typography 'NYAINFO' at the top/bottom. Grid for links.

hero_bg.description: Abstract 3D glowing steel blue geometric shapes

services_bg.description: Cinematic server racks illuminated by vibrant steel blue

testing_and_accessibility.attributes: All interactive elements MUST use data-testid (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='contact-submit').
testing_and_accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over images has sufficient contrast (overlay background with min 50% opacity if necessary).

third_party_libraries.icons: lucide-react for UI, react-icons for tech stack (devicons)
third_party_libraries.animations: framer-motion for scroll reveals, react-fast-marquee for tech stack ticker
third_party_libraries.components: shadcn/ui for Accordion, Forms, Inputs, Toast (Sonner), Carousel
